## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.9

### 🛠️ Fixes
- Restores APK-aligned XS01-WX self-test commands for both older and newer smoke detector paths.
- Stops the test button from reporting a successful self-test locally before X-Sense reports the real result.
- Stops camera sleep changes from faking the camera status before the device reports its real state.
- Tightens pre-created sensor and binary sensor handling so supported entities remain available without inventing alarm, mute, CO, or motion states before real payloads arrive.

### 📚 Documentation
- Tidies the main README landing page and moves update guidance into a dedicated updating note.
